title: vibecheck — Real-Time Emotion Detection
desc: Dual-stream emotion engine: MediaPipe blendshapes at 8 fps for instant feedback blended with Groq LLM every 2s for semantic depth — ten emotion channels running live in the browser.
warning: Backend on Render free tier — first load may take ~30s to wake up.

bullets.rest: ZYX Euler from facial transformation matrix

title: Insurance Document Extraction Platform
desc: FastAPI microservice that extracts structured JSON from insurance documents using self-hosted LLMs — automating document understanding workflows for downstream systems at scale.

bullets.rest: PDF, Excel & DOC via modular pipeline stages

title: 3D AI Avatar Interaction System
desc: Real-time conversational LLM avatar backend — prompt engineering, structured output validation, and WebRTC stitched together for sub-150ms turns at 10k+ msgs/hour.
